member.name: M:ExpenseTrackerApi.Presentation.Controllers.ExpenseController.GetExpenses
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all expenses.
member.response: If the user is not authenticated
If an error occurs on the server

member.name: M:ExpenseTrackerApi.Presentation.Controllers.ExpenseController.GetExpense(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a single expense by its id.
member.param: The id of the expense to retrieve.
member.response: If the user is not authenticated
If the expense was not found
If an error occurs on the server
